vocab.meaning: quá trình học tập khó khăn lúc ban đầu (đòi hỏi nỗ lực lớn để tiến bộ)
vocab.example: Architecture has a notoriously steep learning curve, but mastering the design software is incredibly rewarding.
My studies involve analyzing the theoretical framework of classical sociology to explain modern social behaviors.

vocab.meaning: kinh nghiệm thực hành thực tế
vocab.example: The program provides plenty of hands-on experience through laboratory sessions and field placements.

vocab.meaning: lĩnh vực chuyên biệt/thị trường ngách
vocab.example: I am particularly interested in a niche area of environmental law concerning deep-sea mining regulations.
Our faculty encourages an interdisciplinary approach, combining insights from both biology and computer science.

vocab.meaning: nghiên cứu thực nghiệm (dựa trên quan sát và số liệu)
vocab.example: For my final dissertation, I had to conduct extensive empirical research to validate my hypotheses.
One of the main reasons I chose Finance was the lucrative career prospects available in the global market.

vocab.meaning: đào tạo nghề (tập trung vào kỹ năng làm việc cụ thể)
vocab.example: Unlike purely academic subjects, my major offers vocational training that prepares us for immediate employment.

vocab.meaning: sự khắt khe/chặt chẽ trong phân tích
vocab.example: Studying Philosophy has taught me the analytical rigor needed to deconstruct complex logical arguments.

vocab.meaning: mở đường cho/tạo điều kiện cho
vocab.example: I hope that my current studies in renewable energy will pave the way for a career in sustainable development.
